mapper.insert: INSERT INTO group_link_preview ( group_link_id, group_jid, invite_code, wa_subject, member_size, owner_phone, announce_only, avatar_url, last_preview_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{groupLinkId}, #{groupJid}, #{inviteCode}, #{waSubject}, #{memberSize}, #{ownerPhone}, #{announceOnly}, #{avatarUrl}, #{lastPreviewAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE group_jid = VALUES(group_jid), invite_code = VALUES(invite_code), wa_subject = VALUES(wa_subject), member_size = VALUES(member_size), owner_phone = VALUES(owner_phone), announce_only = VALUES(announce_only), avatar_url = COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(VALUES(avatar_url)), ''), avatar_url), last_preview_at = VALUES(last_preview_at), updated_at = VALUES(updated_at)

INSERT INTO group_link_preview ( group_link_id, invite_code, wa_subject, avatar_url, last_preview_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{groupLinkId}, #{inviteCode}, #{waSubject}, #{avatarUrl}, #{lastPreviewAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE invite_code = COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(VALUES(invite_code)), ''), invite_code), wa_subject = COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(VALUES(wa_subject)), ''), wa_subject), avatar_url = COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(VALUES(avatar_url)), ''), avatar_url), last_preview_at = CASE WHEN NULLIF(TRIM(VALUES(wa_subject)), '') IS NOT NULL OR NULLIF(TRIM(VALUES(avatar_url)), '') IS NOT NULL THEN VALUES(last_preview_at) ELSE last_preview_at END, updated_at = VALUES(updated_at)

INSERT INTO group_link_preview (group_link_id, avatar_url, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{groupLinkId}, #{avatarUrl}, #{updatedAt}, #{updatedAt}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE avatar_url = VALUES(avatar_url), updated_at = VALUES(updated_at)
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM group_link_preview WHERE group_link_id = #{groupLinkId} LIMIT 1
